name: jupyter-chat-root
description: A chat package for Jupyterlab extension

scripts.build: jlpm workspace @jupyter/chat run build && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat run build && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat-extension run build
scripts.build:lite-docs: jlpm workspace @jupyter/chat run build && jlpm workspace jupyter-chat-example run build
scripts.build:prod: jlpm workspace @jupyter/chat run build:prod && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat run build:prod && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat-extension run build:prod && jlpm workspace jupyter-chat-example run build:prod
scripts.clean: jlpm workspace @jupyter/chat run clean && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat run clean && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat-extension run clean && jlpm workspace jupyter-chat-example run clean
scripts.clean:all: jlpm workspace @jupyter/chat run clean:all && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat run clean:all && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat-extension run clean:all && jlpm workspace jupyter-chat-example run clean:all
scripts.install:extension: jlpm workspace @jupyter/chat run install:extension && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat run install:extension && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat-extension run install:extension && jlpm workspace jupyter-chat-example run install:extension
scripts.lint:check: jlpm run prettier:check && jlpm run eslint:check
scripts.lint: jlpm run prettier && jlpm run eslint && jlpm stylelint
scripts.test: jlpm workspace @jupyter/chat run test && jlpm workspace jupyterlab-chat run test
